text.title: Claude Code Hooks Reference Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: not a hook — use a Command
not a hook — use a Command + explicit confirmation

branch.question: Before tool execution (block / approve / modify) or after (format / log)?

conclusion.verdict: PreToolUse hook with exit 0/1/2 semantics + audit log
SessionStart (inject context) OR Stop (guard premature exit) hook

text.example: trigger=on_tool_call → reversible=true → phase=before → PreToolUse hook on matcher 'Bash'; script greps for `rm -rf` and exits 2 with audit log.
